items.name: Rate Limiter
items.description: Limit request volume using a sliding window. The limit applies gateway-wide when the policy is global, otherwise per consumer.

fields.label: Max Requests
fields.description: Maximum number of requests allowed within the window.

fields.label: Window
fields.description: Sliding window duration (e.g. 1s, 1m, 1h).

fields.label: Retry After
fields.description: Value sent in the Retry-After header, in seconds, when the limit is exceeded.

fields.label: Group By Header
fields.description: Optional request header whose value sub-partitions the limit within the policy scope (e.g. X-User-Id). When empty, the limit is counted per gateway (global) or per consumer.

items.name: Request Size Limiter
items.description: Reject requests whose body exceeds configured byte or character limits.

fields.label: Allowed Payload Size
fields.description: Maximum payload size expressed in the selected size unit.

fields.label: Size Unit
fields.description: Unit used to interpret the allowed payload size.

fields.label: Max Characters Per Request
fields.description: Maximum number of UTF-8 characters allowed in the request body.

fields.label: Require Content-Length
fields.description: Reject requests that do not declare a Content-Length header.

items.name: LLM Budget
items.description: Cap LLM spend with token or dollar budgets over time windows, either as one aggregate counter or per-model rules. Applies gateway-wide for global policies, otherwise per consumer.

fields.label: Unit
fields.description: Whether budgets count provider tokens or USD cost.

fields.label: Counting
fields.description: Which usage figure accrues against the budget.

fields.label: Per-Model Rules
fields.description: Per-model budgets. The most specific pattern wins, with an exact model preferred over a wildcard.

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Model slug or wildcard pattern (e.g. claude-opus-*).

fields.label: Max
fields.description: Budget ceiling in tokens or USD, matching the selected unit.

fields.label: Time Window
fields.description: Window duration such as 30m, 1h, or 1d. Values below 60s are raised to 60s.

fields.label: Aggregate Budget
fields.description: Single budget counter for the whole scope, used when per-model rules are not set.

fields.label: Max
fields.description: Budget ceiling in tokens or USD, matching the selected unit.

fields.label: Time Window
fields.description: Window duration such as 30m, 1h, or 1d. Values below 60s are raised to 60s.

fields.label: Behavior On Exceeded
fields.description: Action taken when a budget is exceeded under enforce mode.

fields.label: Downgrade To
fields.description: Target model used when behavior is downgrade_model. Must be on the same provider.

fields.label: Stream Usage Injection
fields.description: Request and inject usage on streaming responses so accrual works on streams.

fields.label: Count Cache Reads
fields.description: Include Anthropic cache-read input tokens in counted and costed usage.

fields.label: Custom Pricing
fields.description: Per-token USD rates keyed by model slug or wildcard pattern, consulted before the builtin table. Used for dollar budgets.

fields.label: Input
fields.description: Input price in USD per token.

fields.label: Output
fields.description: Output price in USD per token.

fields.label: Group By Header
fields.description: Optional request header whose value sub-partitions the budget within the policy scope (e.g. X-User-Id). When empty, the budget is counted per gateway (global) or per consumer.

items.name: Semantic Cache
items.description: Serve cached responses for semantically similar requests, scoped per registry.

fields.label: Similarity Threshold
fields.description: Cosine similarity threshold in (0, 1] required to serve a cache hit.

fields.label: TTL
fields.description: How long cached responses remain valid (e.g. 24h).

fields.label: Provider
fields.description: Embedding provider used to vectorize requests.

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Embedding model name.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Credential for the embedding provider.
